prompt: Create a warm cinematic vertical selfie portrait of a young woman in ornate Chinese hanfu, shot from a high close-up angle with her left arm extended toward the camera. Her face is completely covered by a centered opaque square privacy block in medium warm brown, hiding all facial features. She has dark brown to black hair styled in an elaborate half-up traditional updo with long loose strands falling over both shoulders. Add exactly two large pale aqua-and-white floral hair ornaments, one on each side of the updo, with gold filigree branches, pearl beads, and exactly two long dangling tassel accessories visible, one on the left side and one on the right side. She wears a delicate pale mint blue embroidered hanfu with sheer flowing sleeves, peach-gold floral embroidery, translucent layers, a high collar, and a decorative chest panel with gold trim, pearl-like beads, and a central dangling pale blue pendant. The setting is an intimate traditional East Asian room with warm amber candlelight, wooden window lattice panels in the background, a calligraphy scroll on the left wall with black brush characters, and a glowing paper lantern plus two small candles on a low table. Use shallow depth of field, soft bokeh, warm highlights on hair jewelry, realistic fabric texture, romantic historical-drama styling, and a cozy golden-hour interior atmosphere. Make the composition feel like an accidental elegant selfie, with the sleeve and arm slightly blurred in the foreground and the ornate costume details sharply visible. Use pale mint blue, dark brown to black, warm medium brown, warm amber candlelight, and calligraphy scroll, wooden lattice windows, paper lantern, and two candles.
